title: Settings
description:
The full, validated karet configuration. Load it with
[`crate::config::load`]; the sane baseline is [`Settings::default`].

files.description: File handling (auto-save, encoding, line endings, exclusions).

lsp.description: Language-server integration (completions and future language features).

workbench.description: UI shell appearance (theme, icons, startup panel).

AutoSave.description: When dirty buffers are written back to disk automatically.

oneOf.description: Never auto-save; the user saves explicitly.
Save when the editor loses focus / the active document changes.

cursorLine.description: Highlight the line the caret is on.

formatOnSave.description: Run the configured formatter on save.

graphicalCursor.description:
Draw the caret with terminal graphics: `null` auto-enables when supported,
`true` requests it and reports incompatibility, `false` disables it.

insertFinalNewline.description: Ensure the file ends with a single trailing newline on save.

insertSpaces.description: Insert spaces instead of a hard tab when indenting.

lineNumbers.description: How the line-number gutter is numbered.

rulers.description: Columns to draw vertical rulers at (empty = none).

scrollOff.description: Keep at least this many lines visible above and below the caret.

semanticComments.description: Distinct highlighting of codetag comment blocks (`TODO:`, `FIXME:`, …).

tabSize.description: Number of columns a tab renders as / spaces inserted for one indent level.

trimTrailingWhitespace.description: Strip trailing whitespace from each line on save.

wordWrap.description: Soft-wrap long lines instead of scrolling horizontally.

oneOf.description: Preserve the file's existing endings (LF for new files).

autoSave.description: When to write dirty buffers back to disk automatically.

autoSaveDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before `afterDelay` auto-save fires.

backup.description: Keep crash-recovery backups (swap files) of unsaved buffers.

backupInterval.description: How long a buffer stays dirty (milliseconds) before its swap is written.

confirmOnExit.description: Prompt to save unsaved changes when quitting (rather than discarding them).

encoding.description: Default text encoding label (informational; karet edits UTF-8).

exclude.description: Glob patterns hidden from the file explorer.

watcherExclude.description: Glob patterns excluded from the filesystem watcher.

blame.description: Show inline blame for the current line.

decorations.description: Show gutter change decorations and file-tree status colouring.

oneOf.description: Rich Nerd Font glyphs (needs a patched font).

LineNumbers.description: How the line-number gutter is numbered.

oneOf.description: Numbers relative to the caret line (the caret line shows its absolute number).

enabled.description: Run language servers for open documents (powers completions).

servers.description:
Per-language server launch configurations, keyed by the lowercase
language name (e.g. `"rust"`, `"typescript"`, `"python"`). Entries are
merged *over* the built-in defaults (rust → `rust-analyzer`,
typescript/javascript → `typescript-language-server --stdio`,
python → `pyright-langserver --stdio`), so setting a language here
overrides its default and unlisted languages keep theirs.

LspServer.description: How to launch one language server (see [`Lsp::servers`]).

command.description: The server executable, looked up on `PATH` (or an absolute path).

exclude.description: Glob patterns excluded from workspace search.

smartCase.description: Case-insensitive unless the query contains an uppercase letter.

SemanticComments.description:
`editor.semanticComments.*` — distinct highlighting of codetag comment blocks.

A comment whose content opens with a configured tag — plus the immediately
following non-empty comment lines — is highlighted with an attention-drawing
style instead of the ordinary comment color.

tags.description:
The codetags that open a block. Matching is case-sensitive and whole-word:
the tag must start the comment's content and be followed by `:`, `(`,
whitespace, or the end of the line. Setting this replaces the defaults.

words.description: Extra words treated as correctly spelled.

StartupPanel.description: Which sidebar panel is shown at startup.

colorTheme.description:
Colour theme: the built-in name `"dark"`, or a path to a `.tmTheme` /
VS Code `.json` theme file.

iconStyle.description: Icon glyph set for the file tree and activity bar.

startupPanel.description: Which sidebar panel is shown at startup (`none` starts collapsed).
